languages.text: "Светловость!" {n}Юноша бухается на колени.{/n} "Я б-бы сам! П-правда! Но — не дадут мне все отключать. Д-долго будет. Вам — не откажут! Что угодно обесточьте!"

traits.locale_text: "Светловость!" {n}Юноша бухается на колени.{/n} "Я б-бы сам! П-правда! Но — не дадут мне все отключать. Д-долго будет. Вам — не откажут! Что угодно обесточьте!"

languages.text: "Your L-{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}The young man drops to his knees.{/n} "I w-would do it myself! I-I swear! But — they won't let me turn everything off. It'll take too long. They won't refuse you! Turn off the power to anything!"
languages.original_text: "Светловость!" {n}Юноша бухается на колени.{/n} "Я б-бы сам! П-правда! Но — не дадут мне все отключать. Д-долго будет. Вам — не откажут! Что угодно обесточьте!"

traits.locale_text: "Your L-{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}The young man drops to his knees.{/n} "I w-would do it myself! I-I swear! But — they won't let me turn everything off. It'll take too long. They won't refuse you! Turn off the power to anything!"

"Your L-{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}The young man drops to his knees.{/n} "I w-would do it myself! I-I swear! But — they won't let me turn everything off. It'll take too long. They won't refuse you! Turn off the power to anything!"

"Your L-{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}The young man drops to his knees.{/n} "I w-would do it myself! I-I swear! But — they won't let me turn everything off. It'll take too long. They won't refuse you! Turn off the power to anything!"

languages.text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}!». {n}El joven cae de rodillas.{/n} «Lo... ¡lo haría yo mismo! ¡Lo juro! Pero... no me dejarán desconectar nada. Tardaría demasiado en convencerles. ¡No se lo negarán a usted! ¡Desconecte cualquier cosa!».
languages.original_text: "Your L-{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}The young man drops to his knees.{/n} "I w-would do it myself! I-I swear! But — they won't let me turn everything off. It'll take too long. They won't refuse you! Turn off the power to anything!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}!». {n}El joven cae de rodillas.{/n} «Lo... ¡lo haría yo mismo! ¡Lo juro! Pero... no me dejarán desconectar nada. Tardaría demasiado en convencerles. ¡No se lo negarán a usted! ¡Desconecte cualquier cosa!».

languages.text: “大——大人！”{n}年轻人双膝一软，跪倒在地。{/n}“我——我本想自己去的！我——我发誓！可是——他们不会让我把所有东西都关掉的。太费时间了。但他们不会拒绝您！您只要随便关掉什么设备的电源都行！”
languages.original_text: "Your L-{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}The young man drops to his knees.{/n} "I w-would do it myself! I-I swear! But — they won't let me turn everything off. It'll take too long. They won't refuse you! Turn off the power to anything!"

traits.locale_text: “大——大人！”{n}年轻人双膝一软，跪倒在地。{/n}“我——我本想自己去的！我——我发誓！可是——他们不会让我把所有东西都关掉的。太费时间了。但他们不会拒绝您！您只要随便关掉什么设备的电源都行！”

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie ! {n}s’exclame le jeune homme en tombant à genoux.{/n} J'aimerais m'en charger moi-même ! Je le jure ! Mais... on ne me laissera pas couper le courant. Ça prendrait trop de temps. Mais vous, ils ne vous diront rien ! Allez-y, coupez ce que vous voulez ! »
languages.original_text: "Your L-{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}The young man drops to his knees.{/n} "I w-would do it myself! I-I swear! But — they won't let me turn everything off. It'll take too long. They won't refuse you! Turn off the power to anything!"

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie ! {n}s’exclame le jeune homme en tombant à genoux.{/n} J'aimerais m'en charger moi-même ! Je le jure ! Mais... on ne me laissera pas couper le courant. Ça prendrait trop de temps. Mais vous, ils ne vous diront rien ! Allez-y, coupez ce que vous voulez ! »

languages.text: "L... {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri!" {n}Genç adam, dizlerinin üzerine çöküyor.{/n} "B... Bunu kendim yapardım! Y... Yemin ederim! Ama her şeyi kapatmama i... İzin vermiyorlar. Çok u... Uzun sürer. Sizi r... Reddetmezler! Herhangi bir şeyin gücünü k... Kapatın!"
languages.original_text: "Your L-{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}The young man drops to his knees.{/n} "I w-would do it myself! I-I swear! But — they won't let me turn everything off. It'll take too long. They won't refuse you! Turn off the power to anything!"

traits.locale_text: "L... {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri!" {n}Genç adam, dizlerinin üzerine çöküyor.{/n} "B... Bunu kendim yapardım! Y... Yemin ederim! Ama her şeyi kapatmama i... İzin vermiyorlar. Çok u... Uzun sürer. Sizi r... Reddetmezler! Herhangi bir şeyin gücünü k... Kapatın!"

languages.text: "Eure L-{mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!" {n}Der junge Mann fällt auf die Knie.{/n} "Ich w-würde es ja selbst m-machen. D-das schwöre ich! Aber ... die würden nicht zulassen, dass ich alles abschalte. Das würde zu lange dauern. Euch werden sie nicht zurückweisen. Nehmt alles vom Netz!"
languages.original_text: "Your L-{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}The young man drops to his knees.{/n} "I w-would do it myself! I-I swear! But — they won't let me turn everything off. It'll take too long. They won't refuse you! Turn off the power to anything!"

traits.locale_text: "Eure L-{mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!" {n}Der junge Mann fällt auf die Knie.{/n} "Ich w-würde es ja selbst m-machen. D-das schwöre ich! Aber ... die würden nicht zulassen, dass ich alles abschalte. Das würde zu lange dauern. Euch werden sie nicht zurückweisen. Nehmt alles vom Netz!"

languages.text: 「お-お方様！」{n}青年は膝をついて頭を下げる。{/n}「私-私でやります！誓います！でも-でも、全てを消すことは許されません。時間がかかりすぎるから。お方様は断られないでしょう。何でも消してください！」
languages.original_text: "Your L-{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}The young man drops to his knees.{/n} "I w-would do it myself! I-I swear! But — they won't let me turn everything off. It'll take too long. They won't refuse you! Turn off the power to anything!"

traits.locale_text: 「お-お方様！」{n}青年は膝をついて頭を下げる。{/n}「私-私でやります！誓います！でも-でも、全てを消すことは許されません。時間がかかりすぎるから。お方様は断られないでしょう。何でも消してください！」
